SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-06-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:24am
Judge Pro Tem Michael Lieberman, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Ates Mecit appears in pro per for M Cafe. Respondent, Tom Kereszti appears in pro per for Cafe Razzi. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Lieberman.

EXHR (A) packet of invoices and court documents
EXHA (1) Yelp pages and demand letter

9:33am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
